findings.title: Shell command execution
findings.description: Code calls subprocess.run() which can execute arbitrary system commands
findings.remediation: Use subprocess.run() with explicit argument list. Avoid shell=True. Never pass untrusted input.

findings.title: Unsafe deserialization via webbrowser.open()
findings.description: Code uses webbrowser.open() which can execute arbitrary code during deserialization
findings.remediation: Replace pickle with JSON or MessagePack. Use yaml.safe_load() instead of yaml.load().

findings.title: Dynamic code execution via re.compile()
findings.description: Code uses re.compile() to execute dynamically constructed code
findings.remediation: Use ast.literal_eval() for safe evaluation. Avoid re.compile() with untrusted input.

findings.title: Unexpected capability for git skill: credential_read
findings.description: A 'git' skill would not normally require 'credential_read' capability. Allowed capabilities for this category: file_read, file_write, shell_git
findings.remediation: Review why a git skill needs credential_read access.
